clauses.heading: Insuring Agreement
clauses.text: We will pay those sums the insured becomes legally obligated to pay as damages because of bodily injury or property damage to which this insurance applies, subject to the limits and a new per-occurrence retention of 2,500.

clauses.heading: Definitions — Covered Property
clauses.text: Covered Property means the property described in the Declarations.

clauses.heading: Exclusion — Flood
clauses.text: This insurance does not apply to loss or damage caused directly or indirectly by flood.

clauses.heading: Exclusion — Cyber
clauses.text: This insurance does not apply to any loss, cost, or expense arising out of any access to or use of any computer system or electronic data.

clauses.heading: Limits of Insurance
clauses.text: The most we will pay for the sum of all damages is the General Aggregate Limit of 3,000,000.

clauses.heading: Cancellation
clauses.text: The first Named Insured may cancel this policy by mailing advance written notice of cancellation.

clauses.heading: Duties in the Event of Loss
clauses.text: You must see to it that we are notified as soon as practicable of an occurrence, as further defined in C-DEF-2.

clauses.heading: Notices
clauses.text: Notices to us may be sent to the address shown in the Declarations, Attn: Claims Department.

clauses.heading: Insuring Agreement
clauses.text: We will pay those sums the insured becomes legally obligated to pay as damages because of bodily injury or property damage to which this insurance applies, subject to the limits.

clauses.heading: Definitions — Covered Property
clauses.text: Covered Property means the property described in the Declarations.

clauses.heading: Exclusion — Flood
clauses.text: This insurance does not apply to loss or damage caused directly or indirectly by flood.

clauses.heading: Exclusion — War
clauses.text: This insurance does not apply to loss or damage caused directly or indirectly by war, including undeclared or civil war.

clauses.heading: Limits of Insurance
clauses.text: The most we will pay for the sum of all damages is the General Aggregate Limit of 2,000,000.

clauses.heading: Cancellation
clauses.text: The first Named Insured may cancel this policy by mailing advance written notice of cancellation.

clauses.heading: Duties in the Event of Loss
clauses.text: You must see to it that we are notified as soon as practicable of an occurrence.

clauses.heading: Notices
clauses.text: Notices to us may be sent to the address shown in the Declarations, Attn: Claims Department.
